title: Adzika Milk Rich Adventure
description: A low-carb-friendly umami and adventurous Ethiopian dish featuring milk reduction for a unique twist on traditional cuisine.

ingredients.name: Coconut milk
ingredients.notes: reduced by simmering to reduce the volume and concentrate flavors

instructions: Combine adzika and coconut milk in a saucepan. Simmer gently for about 30 minutes until the liquid has reduced by half.
In another pan, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add chopped garlic and onions; sauté until golden brown.
Add finely diced tomatoes to the onion mixture. Cook for an additional 5-7 minutes or until they soften.
Gradually pour in the reduced adzika coconut milk while stirring continuously to avoid scalding.
Season with kosher salt and black pepper to taste. Serve warm as a main course or side dish.
Optional: garnish with fresh herbs like cilantro or parsley for extra flavor.
